description_long: This is a round chocolate cake with a rustic, textured surface, covered in a patchwork of glossy chocolate ganache drizzles and irregular chocolate shards. The cake is topped with a decorative arrangement of white chocolate curls, artfully placed at the center. The sides of the cake are unevenly adorned with chocolate pieces, giving it a handcrafted, artisanal appearance. The overall color palette is dominated by rich browns and creamy whites, suggesting a decadent chocolate flavor profile. The cake appears dense and moist, with a soft, slightly rough exterior. No candles or display container are visible, and the cake sits directly on a flat surface.
description: A round, rustic chocolate cake with glossy ganache drizzles, chocolate shards, and white chocolate curls on top. The cake has a handcrafted, artisanal look with a rich brown and cream color palette.
description_view_0: Front view shows the white chocolate curls centered on top and a prominent ganache drizzle pattern with scattered chocolate shards.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the side texture and the layered chocolate shards, with the white chocolate curls slightly off-center.
description_view_2: The top decoration is clearly visible, and the ganache drizzles appear more pronounced, with chocolate shards distributed unevenly.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the dense chocolate shard coverage on the side and the layered look of the white chocolate curls on top.
